text: IN CONSIDERATION OF the Insured named in the Schedule hereto having paid to the Shriram General Insurance Company Limited the full premium mentioned in the said schedule
the Company shall pay to the Insured the value of the Property at the time of the happening of its destruction or the amount of such damage
Fire Excluding destruction or damage caused to the property insured by its own fermentation, natural heating or spontaneous combustion.
Explosion/Implosion Excluding loss, destruction of or damage to boilers other than domestic boilers, economizers or other vessels, machinery or apparatus in which steam is generated
Aircraft Damage Loss, Destruction or damage caused by Aircraft, other aerial or space devices and articles dropped therefrom excluding those caused by pressure waves.
Riot, Strike and Malicious Damage Loss of or visible physical damage or destruction by external violent means directly caused to the property insured
this insurance excludes loss, damage cost or expense of whatsoever nature directly or indirectly caused by, resulting from or in connection with any act of terrorism
Terrorism Damage Exclusion Warranty: Notwithstanding any provision to the contrary within this insurance it is agreed that this insurance excludes loss, damage cost or expense
The sum insured shall be Rs. 50,00,000 for the policy period commencing 01/04/2024 to 31/03/2025.
Premium payable: INR 12,500 per annum inclusive of all taxes and levies.
Flood and Inundation including flooding from the sea
Earthquake (Fire and Shock) damage to the property insured
Subsidence and Landslide including Rock Slide
Bursting and/or overflowing of Water Tanks, Apparatus and Pipes
Missile Testing operations causing loss or damage to property
Leakage and contamination cover for property insured against accidental discharge of liquids
The policy does not cover loss or damage due to wear and tear, gradual deterioration, rust or oxidation.
Loss or damage due to nuclear perils, radioactive contamination is strictly excluded from this policy.
Consequential loss of any kind or description is excluded from coverage under this policy.
Loss, destruction or damage to bullion or unset precious stones is not covered.
The insured shall give immediate notice to the Company in case of any loss or damage.
All disputes arising out of this policy shall be referred to arbitration under the Arbitration and Conciliation Act, 1996.
This policy is issued to Tata Motors Limited, Mumbai for the period 01/01/2024 to 31/12/2024.
Total sum insured under this policy is Rs. 2,50,00,000 (Two Crore Fifty Lakh Rupees only).
Annual premium for this policy is Rs. 18,750 plus applicable GST.
The insured Reliance Industries Limited shall maintain adequate fire safety measures on the insured premises.
Policy number GEN312 is valid from 15/06/2023 to 14/06/2024 and covers Standard Fire and Special Perils.
Coverage under this policy includes damage caused by storm, cyclone, typhoon, tempest, hurricane, tornado, flood or inundation.
The maximum liability of the insurer under this policy shall not exceed Rs. 75,00,000.
This certificate is issued to HDFC Bank Limited as certificate holder as of 01/03/2024.
General liability coverage limit is USD 1,000,000 per occurrence and USD 2,000,000 aggregate.
Products and completed operations coverage of USD 500,000 applies to this policy.
The policy excludes damage caused by intentional acts, fraud, or misrepresentation by the insured.
Workers compensation and employers liability coverage is provided under this certificate.
Automobile liability coverage limit: USD 500,000 combined single limit per accident.
The insured Mahindra and Mahindra Ltd has paid a premium of Rs. 45,000 for comprehensive coverage.
Coverage commences on 01/07/2023 and expires on 30/06/2024 unless renewed prior to expiry.
Infosys BPO Limited is the named insured under policy number IRDA2024/GEN/001.
The deductible applicable to each and every loss is Rs. 5,000.
Loss or damage caused by war, invasion, act of foreign enemy, hostilities, civil war, rebellion is excluded.
The insured Wipro Technologies shall be indemnified for losses not exceeding Rs. 1,00,00,000.
Storm and Tempest damage is covered under this policy subject to the terms and conditions herein.
Lightning damage is covered under Section I of this Standard Fire and Special Perils Policy.
Impact damage caused by any rail, road vehicle or animal is covered.
The reinstatement value policy covers the cost of rebuilding or replacing property to its original condition.
Loss or damage to property caused by its own mechanical or electrical breakdown is excluded.
Damage caused by pollution or contamination unless caused by an insured peril is excluded from this policy.
The insured shall on the happening of any loss give notice thereof to the Company within 24 hours.
Policy inception date is 01/04/2023 and the policy expires on 31/03/2024.
The insured ICICI Lombard General Insurance Co. Ltd. has a sum insured of Rs. 5,00,00,000.
Quarterly premium installment of Rs. 3,250 is due on the first day of each quarter.
Theft, burglary, housebreaking or any attempt thereat is excluded from this Standard Fire Policy.
Spontaneous fermentation or heating of goods is not covered under this policy.
The named insured Bajaj Auto Limited holds a commercial general liability policy effective 01/06/2024.
Business interruption coverage applies for a maximum indemnity period of 12 months.
The policy covers loss of profits resulting from interruption of business caused by an insured peril.
Additional premium of Rs. 2,100 shall be charged for inclusion of earthquake cover.
The certificate holder is Citibank N.A. Mumbai Branch and coverage is effective from 15/08/2023.
Total premium collected for this policy year amounts to Rs. 67,500 including terrorism cover.
The maximum amount payable under the consequential loss section is Rs. 25,00,000.
